objective: Execute the approved HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot packet from clean preflight through test-first implementation, full cross-platform proof, fresh review until CLEAN, primary commit, separate parent closeout, and stop without beginning HCM-2.2.

sections: HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate

work_completed: Landed the closed Project Context 1.0 canonical YAML record, duplicate-safe parser, exact emitter, fixed renderer, independent fingerprints, and retained no-follow observation boundary.

Cut compiler authoring, Doctor 1.1.0, flow rendering and budget domains, CLI surfaces, fixtures, and Environment Inventory references over to selected .handbook/project/context.yaml without persisted Project Context Markdown.

Proved validation-only non-mutation, atomic authoring lock and recheck ordering, native non-Unix pre-mutation refusal, selected-path ownership, retired Markdown irrelevance, and selected-namespace root detection.
Completed six implementation reviews, two bounded authority repair reviews, and five final complete-subject reviews with parent remediation and different-fresh re-review, ending CLEAN.
Passed canonical-LF workspace, strict Clippy, rustdoc, package and definition, archive, installed smoke, all validator modes, native Windows, scope, secret, whitespace, and GitNexus gates.

deliverables.summary: Closed canonical record, parser, exact serializer, fixed renderer, and fingerprint domains.
Selected descriptor-owned no-follow load with retained observation and final stability proof.
Validation and atomic authoring with lock and under-lock recheck safety.
Doctor 1.1.0 Project Context fingerprint row and fixed failures.
Selected Project Context flow bridge, packet rendering, and retired-path non-influence.
Separated source and rendered byte budget domains.
Public project-context author and validate CLI.
Installed offline author, Doctor, and packet-inspect proof.
Complete implementation, platform, package, validator, scope, and review evidence.
Selected-root remediation and broad replay evidence before the clean fifth review.
Parent-owned v1.2 completed closeout bound to the primary commit.

decisions.summary: Only shipped instance project_context moves to canonical YAML in this pilot.
decisions.authority_effect: PG-YAML-01 closes only for exact selected instance project_context; no program-wide or sibling-family promotion is claimed.

decisions.summary: The deterministic Markdown representation is an in-memory view and is never persisted as editable Project Context truth.
decisions.authority_effect: The retired Markdown path cannot select, establish, validate, render, budget, or influence Project Context truth.

decisions.summary: Setup remains non-authoring while author, Doctor, flow, and Environment Inventory consume the selected path through bounded mixed-family bridges.
decisions.authority_effect: No setup materialization, definition or schema, pipeline or stage, installed-skill, SDK, or HCM-2.2 authority is added.

decisions.summary: HCM-2.1 is complete at the exact product-path proof ceiling and HCM-2.2 does not begin automatically.
decisions.authority_effect: Any next slice requires a new explicit top-level request and selected authority.

findings.summary: Review 1 required final observation stability and ABA proof, retired-path nonreads, complete total-budget enforcement, private retained bytes, and broader edge proof; all were repaired before Review 2.

Review 2 required removal of public raw-observation equality leakage, schema-valid typed serialization, removal of retired rich APIs, complete positive author and Doctor proof, and Clippy cleanup; all were repaired before Review 3.
Review 3 required complete subject admission, a crate-private selected-path constant, and native-Windows test and lint portability cleanup; all were repaired before Review 4.
Review 4 required aggregate charging for failed and overflow reads, corrected installed-smoke Doctor handling, and truthful validate help; all were repaired before Review 5.
Review 5 found two refusal-precedence tests omitted required selected Project Context truth; valid fixtures and Unix gating were added without weakening native refusal proof before Review 6.
Final Review 1 required a real public-author lock-contention regression proving no completion or mutation while held and under-lock recheck after release.
Final Review 2 required byte-distinct candidate and existing truth so the lock regression detects write-before-recheck ordering defects.
Final Review 3 required the installed all-three smoke to invoke packet inspection and bind the selected path, rendered content, both fingerprints, and legacy-path absence.
Final Review 4 required mixed-family root detection to admit the selected Project Context namespace, identify missing Charter next, and retain retired Markdown irrelevance.

validation.evidence_ref: Canonical-LF complete subject replay passed every target.

validation.command: HCM-2.1 targeted engine, compiler, flow, and CLI suites
real-lock missing-lock and write-before-recheck mutation proof
native Windows MSVC runtime and selected-root regression wall
package archive and exact 29-member definition replay

validation.evidence_ref: All three modes passed on the exact final subject.
Archive self-test and supported-root scan passed.

validation.command: scope, secret, machine-path, whitespace, and prohibited-path scans
validation.evidence_ref: No unauthorized or sensitive content found.

validation.command: npx gitnexus analyze --index-only and npx gitnexus detect-changes
validation.evidence_ref: Index refresh and mandatory change-detection command completed.

pack_updates.reason: Record selected Project Context ownership without widening siblings.
Record slice completion and no automatic HCM-2.2 transition.

sections: HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate
pack_updates.reason: Record proof ceiling and remediation walls.
Record parent completion and reviewed commit.
Rebuild the query ledger for this closeout.

resume.objective: No automatic resume is authorized. HCM-2.2 or any adjacent slice requires a new explicit top-level request with its own runtime parameters and selected handoff.
resume.condition: Only resume when the user explicitly selects a new authorized slice after this record and deterministic ledger validation on a clean tree.
prohibited_scope: Starting HCM-2.2 or another slice without an explicit user request and newly selected authority
Treating this exact pilot as program-wide canonical-YAML, SDK, publication, or sibling-family completion
Removing temporary bridges outside their scheduled later slice or adding adjacent cleanup during closeout
acceptance_criteria: HCM-2.1 primary commit d61670eb2906c6725d0c268c8f63245297808b6f exists and was independently reviewed CLEAN.
Parent v1.2 closeout and deterministic ledger validate in all three modes.
Working tree is clean after the mechanical closeout commit.
stop_conditions: Stop if HCM-2.2 or broader authority is required; create a new explicit orchestration.

chat_summary: HCM-2.1 landed selected Project Context canonical YAML with deterministic rendering, author, Doctor, and flow adoption, native Windows and canonical-LF proof, and final Review 5 CLEAN. Primary commit: d61670eb2906c6725d0c268c8f63245297808b6f. HCM-2.2 did not start.
